item.title: 随记 2023-8-31
item.content:encoded:
title: 随记 2023-8-31 tags: 随记, journal, 2023, 快乐，妄想

如果我活着而没有这些东西，那我的快乐就是一种占有的快乐，一种拥有我的生命的快乐，一种占有我自己生命的快乐。

我觉得占有我自己生命的快乐也没有所谓的精神分析批评的那么不堪。

我觉得如果一个人拥有占有着自己的生命的快乐，这也没什么不好的，而且是可以理解的。

可以体验出来这种倾向我觉得这是可以理解的.

如何过得很“好”，然后死掉，这样好像首先會更加超越一些。它是一個超越自我的選項。其實它不是一種圓滿的回答，能感覺到它是一個好的答案。但是問題是冲动然後並不現實。更现实的是，只有活下去，接下来才有可能得到更多。而不存在活不下去了，只要牺牲一点就能得到的选项。

这个选项只是一种妄想。在整个半年甚至一年中我是在这种妄想中度过的。也是一种基于对别人的误读，或者说对一种想象的误读，对自身想象的误解。

有一種類似於“認知酸雨”一类說法。這種价值观就是一種認知上的酸雨。它會讓人心智不清楚。

item.title: Journal 2023 8-14 ~ 8-24
item.content:encoded:
title: Journal 2023 8-14 ~ 8-24

tags : journal javascript

Journal 2023 8-14 ~ 8-24

I've just got up. Everything is still quiet.

I should have started with these habits back in May, especially getting up at 7 in the morning. It gives me what I want: silence, and it also gives me what the night doesn't offer: the rising sun.

My head is suddenly empty.

Bottled water is handy and also tasty. Tap water tastes bad (hard). I cannot bear it.

Let us return to the subject of habits. When do I feel that habits are bullshit and don't want to bother with daily routines? When I am in a hurry. I want the sweetness to come quickly and waiting means failure to me. Mindset changes. One day I asked myself why people choose hardships, is it because they like to endure? Not quite. I realised that hardship promises a future in which we win what we dream of. Foolishly, I thought that fun was the reason people put in the effort, which it is, but for many things the result is the main motivation.

Recently I also learned Javascript. Promise is a key concept in Javascript. In javascript, we often wait for a function to finish and do the next thing only after the function has finished. Waiting takes time, but in the end we get what we want. Waiting also has its advantages: priorities, optimising the use of limited resources... Life is really the same.

item.title: Test 2
item.content:encoded:
title: Test 2 tags: test, test2, test3

Donec semper nisl a auctor laoreet. Integer risus elit, consequat consequat vehicula sed, maximus vitae dui. Quisque pretium convallis molestie. Vivamus at nulla malesuada, sollicitudin tortor id, sagittis turpis. Aliquam erat volutpat. Ut laoreet sit amet tortor a faucibus. Suspendisse potenti.

Mauris egestas, tellus eu congue cursus, erat orci porta arcu, a fermentum orci nunc nec elit. Maecenas eu mollis sem. Donec ac tempus nisi, quis sodales neque. Duis pharetra id urna eget semper. Nulla finibus molestie sem at rutrum. Curabitur auctor ut erat sed ornare. Praesent accumsan vulputate augue sed auctor.

Morbi quis eros tempus, feugiat ipsum et, vestibulum massa. Vivamus scelerisque, nisl id faucibus faucibus, purus neque dictum risus, quis convallis lorem velit vitae justo. Aliquam vehicula justo non neque porttitor, et porta ipsum fringilla. Duis tempor pulvinar risus, mollis tincidunt nulla cursus ac. Curabitur molestie nisl quis diam volutpat, vitae commodo enim dignissim. Morbi vulputate ante nec neque ornare ullamcorper. Sed iaculis rhoncus velit, id placerat augue ultrices nec. Fusce condimentum velit ac est tempus condimentum.

Vestibulum non odio ipsum. Nam lobortis at ante ut vehicula. Etiam dapibus justo ut feugiat fermentum. Mauris vitae consequat massa. Donec maximus ante velit, non mattis arcu commodo sit amet. Aenean vehicula dictum sapien, quis pretium ligula tincidunt ac. Sed risus ante, eleifend ac lacinia eget, euismod in diam. Phasellus nisl turpis, fermentum quis euismod vel, mattis non purus. Vivamus sed est id turpis blandit ullamcorper sed ut sapien. In hac habitasse platea dictumst. Cras volutpat augue maximus sapien interdum, sed facilisis augue mollis.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Maecenas sodales mauris dapibus nibh molestie, vitae aliquam odio dictum. Quisque tincidunt lacus vel sem mollis dignissim. Morbi sodales vel ipsum id tincidunt. Phasellus semper consectetur erat. Duis cursus, justo vel iaculis sollicitudin, tortor lacus consectetur metus, vestibulum aliquet massa leo quis mauris. Proin at imperdiet leo. Maecenas placerat, neque tempor mollis feugiat, odio felis euismod mauris, ac elementum purus justo et augue. Donec id erat dignissim, pellentesque orci vitae, venenatis tellus. Morbi eu aliquam odio. In sollicitudin nunc sed dignissim euismod. Integer magna odio, cursus id finibus in, molestie a orci. Maecenas sit amet dignissim ex, quis pharetra magna.

Etiam risus metus, venenatis eget urna ultricies, tempor tristique mi. Maecenas non accumsan nisl. Mauris viverra, erat eu blandit vestibulum, felis lorem vulputate risus, nec luctus eros felis at ligula. Donec ullamcorper pulvinar lorem, non accumsan sem pharetra non. Duis posuere dolor id odio fringilla, sit amet egestas sem posuere. Praesent sit amet massa vitae ex imperdiet consectetur non sit amet augue. Phasellus volutpat facilisis eros, at lacinia mauris vestibulum sit amet. Nam id fringilla augue. Mauris condimentum, lorem ac dictum iaculis, nulla purus euismod ipsum, a hendrerit ipsum odio ut sem. Duis in posuere risus.

Aliquam bibendum placerat nisl vitae eleifend. Mauris et consequat nulla, non cursus libero. Cras lacinia vulputate tortor sit amet scelerisque. Aliquam ac nibh eros. Ut at tristique metus. Sed pulvinar gravida mauris sit amet lacinia. Nulla pellentesque orci dictum dui varius, in feugiat ante hendrerit. Duis id ante ante. Maecenas semper, lacus sed semper molestie, ipsum quam imperdiet mi, at pharetra erat dolor id massa. Sed volutpat dapibus neque nec ultrices. Sed justo risus, pulvinar id fringilla at, congue a sem. Sed ac nibh mi. Maecenas vitae leo at ante ultricies tempor at id nisi. Mauris cursus dictum leo, at faucibus metus pulvinar nec. Praesent pretium sodales luctus. Mauris metus diam, varius elementum eros nec, faucibus maximus arcu.

Phasellus vitae lacus bibendum, viverra dolor sed, commodo elit. Vivamus at orci nec arcu dignissim gravida. Aliquam porta ex nec felis tristique fermentum. Etiam quis justo a tellus vulputate egestas ut eu libero. Integer auctor tortor in semper blandit. Suspendisse porttitor massa viverra rhoncus accumsan. Phasellus lacus eros, ullamcorper eu ornare ac, suscipit id libero. Sed vulputate urna et mi commodo, tempus blandit tellus gravida. Suspendisse porttitor posuere magna eget mollis. Pellentesque sed lacus id orci fringilla pretium. Phasellus quis massa eget augue vestibulum blandit. Integer sollicitudin tortor quis eros semper tempus. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Vivamus malesuada purus eget nunc faucibus iaculis. In nec molestie massa, vel finibus sem.

Nam pharetra velit et ultricies congue. Nullam efficitur mollis odio in porta. Sed molestie tortor eu arcu mattis, quis bibendum orci feugiat. Vestibulum semper blandit felis non pellentesque. Pellentesque commodo ac velit ac ornare. Cras ac pellentesque leo. Mauris eget molestie quam. Phasellus lectus magna, condimentum semper mollis vitae, pretium vel turpis. Phasellus dapibus dolor in dui viverra, commodo elementum tortor aliquet. Quisque dapibus leo in arcu facilisis, sed rhoncus ipsum mollis. Etiam at neque fermentum, tempor enim pulvinar, posuere mi. Suspendisse et neque cursus, bibendum neque vitae, tempus dolor.

item.title: 周记 8-7 ~ 8-13
item.content:encoded:
title: 周记 8-7 ~ 8-13

周记

上周也发生了很多事~~

mkdoc 多语言： 想把博客改用 mkdocs 写。发现它能支持多语言。不过最后因为懒惰还是继续用自己写的简陋小脚本生成博客页面，不用再设置什么，能把时间省下来。

找到了一个声称能帮助mastodon显示所有评论的东西：reddit.com/r/Mastodon.... 可是用了以后，自己也不确定有没有起作用。

试着用http shortcut 朗读喵窝公共时间线。朗读的内容常常听不懂在说什么。下划线被直接读出来。因为文字转换成声音以后听不懂在说什么，我感叹道:

用了几周 table habit。感觉不错。我设置的习惯之一是每天至少看一会书。没超过30分钟，甚至不到30分钟。一开始锻炼身体的项目很单调。后来决定有了跳舞, 做操几个选项. 客观地说，感觉还好。

任何尝试应该在一段时间以后再评价，回顾太频繁反而不好。评价方式应该客观，只要有好的地方就承认，不一定要让所有方面都好起来。

item.title: 摸鱼儿
item.content:encoded:
title: 摸鱼儿

摸鱼儿

宋・李演

又西风、四桥疏柳，惊蝉相对秋语。
琼荷万笠花云重，袅袅红衣如舞。
鸿北去
渺岸芷汀芳，几点斜阳字。
吴亭旧树。
又系我扁舟，渔乡钓里，秋色淡归鹭。
长干路。
草莽疏烟断墅。
商歌如写羁旅。
丹溪翠岫登临事，苔屐尚黏苍土。
鸥且住。
怕月冷吟魂，婉冉空江暮。
明灯暗浦。
更短笛衔风，长云弄晚，天际画秋句。
